name: The Beach
description: Waves crash against the sandy shore. The air is thick with salt and mystery. This is where your journey begins.

name: The Fringe
description: The edge of the known world. Familiar creatures lurk here, but the air feels different — charged with possibility.

name: The Dying Forest
description: Trees bend like old bones and the underbrush reeks of rot. Predators and desperate outlaws stalk the shadows.
